verdict: Buy XEQT.TO at $44.48 CAD. Core is 10.6% vs 40% target — $1,873 to go. Fund first, every deposit.
Cap breaches: CEG, OSS. Do not add — shrink by dilution.
Theme concentration at 89.3%. Building XEQT core is the fix.
Skip: MSFT above zone; PLTR above no-chase.
